caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "I CN NEVER DO SHIT" is seated in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. Behind him, a wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs, and a mannequin wearing a white jacket stands to his right near racks of clothing. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. Across the sequence, the man is speaking and smiling, with his facial expressions shifting as he talks. In the final frame, he raises his right arm in a gesture. Two logos are visible at the bottom of the scene: a circular black and white logo on the left and a red text logo that reads "BOOSTLY" on the right.
